overall.description: A first-person exploration through a surreal, neon-lit urban environment at night. The scene features floating crystalline rocks, a towering building with yellow neon accents, and stylized commercial structures including a CVS pharmacy, rendered in a low-poly video game aesthetic.

The camera moves steadily forward through the empty space, with the ground appearing as white paved tiles and the sky clear and dark above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a surreal nighttime plaza that shifts from a focus on a massive neon skyscraper to a wider view of a crystalline landscape. It begins by gliding forward across white paved tiles, flanked by a towering neon-lit building and large floating crystalline rocks under a dark, clear sky. As the camera maintains its forward momentum and gradually turns left, the massive building recedes into the background to make room for a green-lit structure emerging on the periphery. The perspective then expands to reveal a prominent golden obelisk centered in the frame, before finally opening up to show various yellow-lit structures scattered across the distant, surreal horizon.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a surreal neon plaza that shifts from a focus on massive crystalline formations to a detailed exploration of stylized commercial structures. It begins by approaching a towering pinkish crystalline structure, gliding across the plaza toward a glowing CVS sign. As the camera moves forward, it tilts upward to examine the intricate facade of a tall building illuminated by yellow neon lights before descending back toward the street level. The scene then shifts its focus entirely to the CVS pharmacy area, where the tall neon building recedes into the background. Finally, the camera weaves through the red and white branding of the commercial kiosks and surrounding abstract sculptures to conclude the exploration.
